notes: Live worker scaling: changing worker counts now applies within ~30s, no node restart. Staged Files is now real tdarr-style staging — the next N health-checked jobs on deck, sized by the staged-limit box. New 'Replace originals' toggle in the Options bar (auto-accept only skips review). Node v2.23 also auto-spills temp to the roomiest drive when full. Server v3.30.
